# Poisoning the FOSS Well

> A Quarto RevealJS presentation by Indrajeet Patil.

A presentation about how AI-generated pull requests, new security attack surfaces, and collapsing trust are poisoning the FOSS movement.

## Primary URL

- [Slides](https://www.indrapatil.com/ai-poisoned-foss-well/)

## Source

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/IndrajeetPatil/ai-poisoned-foss-well/)

## Topics

- open source
- foss
- ai
- software security
- maintainers
- free open source software
- presentation
- slides

- [Full agent summary](https://www.indrapatil.com/ai-poisoned-foss-well/llms-full.txt)
